title: The Big Picture: Coated tanker earnings 2025 - A retrospective
section_path: The Big Picture: Coated tanker earnings 2025 - A retrospective
section_path_text: The Big Picture: Coated tanker earnings 2025 - A retrospective
summary:
Main
By Mary Melton
With the initial shock of the Red Sea attacks behind them, the strong coated tanker earnings in H1 2024 had returned to earth by the end of last year. Rates bottomed out in the last quarter of 2024, averaging a still healthy $18k/day for MRs, $26k/day for LR1s and $31k/day for LR2s. The first quarter of this year saw rates improve for the larger coated tankers.
